rumor.detail: Back on trial at Carrington post-U17 AFCON. Eligible summer 2026.

newIntel.reasoning: NEW trial activity dated Mar 23, 2026 — distinct from Sep 2025 trial already documented. Gate passes (Mar 23 > Mar 23 latest rumor date). Verified identity: Ettienne Mendy (b.2008), Diambars FC, Senegal, FW/RW. First trial return post-tournament.

needsReview.detail: AfricaFoot reported Jan 14, 2026: FC Nordsjælland close to signing Yao from San Pedro. Brother of Gervinho.
needsReview.reason: Jan 14, 2026 publication is OLDER than existing rumor date of Jan 15, 2026. May be duplicate intel with slightly different date/source. Request clarification on original article date vs. reporting date.
